Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute near 63rd/State
ShortDescription: 63 63rd buses temp. rerouted  due to, street blockage near 63rd/State.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 63rd/State.

Westbound  buses will operate via 63rd, State, 59th, Yale and 63rd including the normal route streets.

Eastbound buses will operate via 63rd, Yale, Marquette, State and 63rd.

Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
